nodes.name: Hypositta
nodes.summary: Hypositta（Hypositta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Nuthatch vanga。

nodes.name: Nuthatch vanga
nodes.summary: Nuthatch vanga（Hypositta corallirostris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Nuthatch vanga。

nodes.name: Nuthatch vanga
nodes.summary: The nuthatch vanga (Hypositta corallirostris), also known as the coral-billed nuthatch-vanga and formerly as the coral-billed nuthatch, is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is endemic to Madagascar. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
